title: Spaghetti Bolognese
description: The weeknight classic. Slow-simmered mince, rich tinned tomato, a knob of butter to finish.
steps: Dice onion, mince garlic.
Brown mince in olive oil, 6 min.
Add onion and garlic, cook until soft.
Tip in tinned tomatoes, season, simmer 20 min.
Cook spaghetti to package instructions.
Toss through sauce, top with parmesan.

title: Green Thai Curry
description: Bright, punchy green curry with chicken thigh and coconut milk.
steps: Fry curry paste in a splash of oil, 1 min.
Add diced chicken, toss to coat.
Pour in coconut milk, simmer 12 min.
Season with fish sauce and lime.
Serve over jasmine rice, top with basil and chilli.

title: Chicken Tikka Masala
description: Yoghurt-marinated chicken in a tomato-cream sauce. Better than takeaway.
steps: Marinate chicken in yoghurt and curry powder, 30 min or overnight.
Sear chicken in hot pan, set aside.
Soften onion and garlic.
Add tomatoes, simmer 10 min, then cream.
Return chicken, simmer 8 min.
Serve over basmati, top with coriander.

title: Haloumi Grain Bowl
description: Crispy haloumi, roast pumpkin, rocket, lemon. Lunch goals.
steps: Roast pumpkin with oil and cumin, 25 min at 200°C.
Cook rice.
Fry haloumi slices till golden both sides.
Assemble bowl: rice, rocket, pumpkin, haloumi.
Squeeze lemon over the lot.

title: Sausage Pasta Bake
description: Snags out of their skins, tomato, pasta, a crust of cheese. Feeds a crowd.
steps: Squeeze snag meat out of skins, brown in pan.
Add diced onion and garlic, soften.
Pour in tomatoes, simmer.
Cook pasta, reserving some water.
Combine, tip into dish, top with mozzarella.
Bake 15 min at 200°C until bubbly.

title: Sunday Roast Chook
description: Whole chicken, crispy skin, lemon and garlic.
steps: Preheat oven to 200°C.
Pat chook dry, rub with oil and salt.
Stuff cavity with halved lemon and garlic.
Roast on a bed of potatoes, 75 min.
Rest 10 min before carving.

title: Veggie Fried Rice
description: Leftover rice, a fridge raid, one pan. Dinner in 10.
steps: Scramble eggs, set aside.
Fry garlic and diced carrot.
Add peas and cold rice, toss over high heat.
Pour soy sauce down the side of the pan.
Fold in eggs and spring onion.

title: Pumpkin & Chickpea Curry
description: Sweet pumpkin, creamy coconut, warming curry powder.
steps: Soften onion with curry powder.
Add diced pumpkin, toss to coat.
Pour in coconut milk, simmer 20 min.
Add chickpeas and spinach for last 3 min.
Serve over basmati.

title: Lemon Chicken & Rice
description: One-pan, lemon-bright, weeknight winner.
steps: Sear chicken in oil, skin-side down.
Remove, add garlic and rice, toast 1 min.
Pour in stock and lemon juice.
Return chicken, cover, simmer 22 min.
Rest 5 min, scatter parsley.

title: BBQ Snag Sanga
description: Bread, snag, grilled onions, sauce. A national treasure.
steps: Fire up the BBQ.
Slice onions, fry in butter until golden.
Grill snags, turning often.
Butter bread, fold around snag and onions.

title: Prawn Pad Thai
description: Rice noodles, prawns, peanuts, lime. Takeaway at home.
steps: Mix fish sauce, peanut butter, lime for sauce.
Fry prawns 2 min, remove.
Scramble eggs in pan.
Toss cooked rice noodles with sauce (use spaghetti in a pinch).
Return prawns, top with spring onion and chilli.

title: Smashed Avo on Toast
description: The brunch standard. Sourdough, avo, feta, lemon, chilli flakes.
steps: Toast bread.
Mash avo with lemon and salt.
Pile on toast, crumble feta over.
Drizzle oil, chilli flakes.

title: Beef Tacos
description: Soft tortillas, spiced mince, avo, lime.
steps: Brown mince with cumin and paprika.
Dice tomato and avo.
Warm tortillas.
Assemble: mince, toppings, coriander, lime.

title: Zucchini Slice
description: The lunchbox legend. Eggs, zucchini, bacon, a bit of cheese.
steps: Grate zucchini, squeeze out moisture.
Mix with beaten eggs, flour, diced bacon, onion, cheese.
Pour into lined tin.
Bake 35 min at 180°C until set and golden.

title: Chicken Caesar Salad
description: Crisp lettuce, smoky bacon, parmesan, a punchy dressing.
steps: Grill chicken, slice.
Fry bacon until crisp, tear.
Toast bread, cube for croutons.
Boil eggs 6 min, halve.
Toss leaves with dressing, top with all.

title: Tuna Pasta
description: Pantry-raid dinner. Spaghetti, tuna, lemon, chilli.
steps: Cook pasta.
Warm oil with garlic and chilli.
Flake in tuna, lemon zest.
Toss with pasta and parsley.

title: Red Lentil Dahl
description: The humble hero. Creamy, spiced, cheap.
steps: Soften onion, garlic, ginger.
Add spices, toast 1 min.
Tip in lentils, tomato, coconut milk, 3 cups water.
Simmer 25 min until thick.
Serve over rice.

title: Mushroom Risotto
description: Slow-stirred, silky, generous with parmesan.
steps: Soften onion and garlic in butter.
Add rice, toast 2 min.
Splash in wine, stir till absorbed.
Add stock a ladle at a time, stirring, 20 min.
Fold in fried mushrooms and parmesan.

title: Fish Tacos
description: Flaky barramundi, cabbage slaw, lime crema.
steps: Season fish with paprika, pan-fry 3 min each side.
Shred lettuce.
Stir yoghurt with lime juice for crema.
Flake fish, fill warm tortillas, top with slaw and crema.

title: Shakshuka
description: Eggs poached in a spiced tomato sauce. Weekend brunch.
steps: Soften onion, capsicum, garlic.
Add paprika, then tomatoes, simmer 10 min.
Make wells, crack in eggs.
Cover, cook 5 min till whites set.
Crumble feta, serve with bread.

title: Pesto Pasta
description: Fresh basil, parmesan, garlic. Fifteen-minute dinner.
steps: Blitz basil, garlic, parmesan, oil, lemon.
Cook pasta, reserve splash of water.
Toss pasta with pesto.

title: Chicken Schnitty
description: Pub classic. Crunchy crumb, squeeze of lemon.
steps: Butterfly and bash chicken thin.
Flour, egg, crumb.
Shallow-fry in butter, 4 min each side.
Serve with lemon wedges.

title: Sweet Potato Soup
description: Velvety, warming, crowd-pleasing.
steps: Soften onion and garlic.
Add cubed sweet potato and cumin.
Pour in stock, simmer 20 min.
Blitz with coconut milk until silky.

title: Prawn Linguine
description: Garlic, chilli, white wine, parsley.
steps: Cook pasta.
Sizzle garlic and chilli in oil.
Add prawns, cook 2 min, deglaze with wine.
Toss with pasta, parsley, lemon.

title: Moroccan Lamb
description: Slow-spiced lamb with chickpeas, apricots, couscous.
steps: Brown lamb in batches.
Soften onions with spices.
Return lamb, add tomato, chickpeas, stock.
Simmer 90 min, lid off last 20.
Scatter coriander.

title: Breakfast Frittata
description: Sunday clean-out the fridge eggs.
steps: Par-boil diced potato.
Fry onion and potato until golden.
Add spinach to wilt.
Pour over beaten eggs, dot with feta.
Finish under grill 5 min till puffed.

title: Steak & Chips
description: Hot pan, butter, a pile of chips. No frills.
steps: Roast chip-cut potatoes 25 min.
Pat steaks dry, season.
Blazing hot pan, 3 min a side, butter basted.
Rest 5 min. Serve with chips.

title: Veggie Wrap
description: Lunch for humans who hate the sad desk salad.
steps: Grill haloumi slices.
Warm wrap.
Layer with avo, haloumi, cucumber, rocket, feta.
Roll tight, slice on the bias.

title: Chilli Con Carne
description: Smoky, spicy, crowd-feeding.
steps: Brown mince with spices.
Add diced onion and capsicum.
Tip in tomatoes and beans.
Simmer 40 min.
Serve with rice or corn chips.

title: Banana Bread
description: Speckled bananas, brown butter, the kindest loaf.
steps: Mash bananas.
Cream butter and sugar, add eggs.
Fold in bananas, flour, cinnamon.
Bake 55 min at 170°C.
Cool in tin 15 min.

title: Poached Eggs
description: Vinegar, simmer, spoon, done. Eggs-ellence.
steps: Simmer water with a splash of vinegar.
Swirl, slip in egg, 3 min.
Lift, rest on tea towel.
Pile on buttered toast.

title: Greek Salad
description: Tomato, cucumber, olives, feta, oregano. Nothing hiding.
steps: Chunk tomato, cucumber, red onion.
Toss with oil and lemon.
Top with feta slab.
Crack of pepper.

title: Hummus & Flatbread
description: Creamy chickpea dip. Snack-dinner energy.
steps: Blitz chickpeas, garlic, lemon, cumin.
Stream in oil till silky.
Warm wraps, tear, dip.

title: Carbonara
description: Eggs, parmesan, bacon, pepper. No cream. Fight me.
steps: Crisp bacon.
Cook spaghetti, reserve water.
Whisk eggs, parmesan, pepper.
Off heat, toss pasta with egg mix, loosen with water.
Fold in bacon.

title: Salmon Teriyaki
description: Sticky, glossy, rice underneath.
steps: Sear salmon skin-side down.
Mix soy, honey, grated ginger.
Add sauce, reduce until sticky.
Serve over rice with spring onion.

title: Potato Salad
description: BBQ side dish of the gods.
steps: Boil potatoes till tender.
Boil eggs 8 min, cool, chop.
Toss warm potato with yoghurt, eggs, spring onion.
Season well, scatter parsley.

title: Minestrone
description: Vegetables, beans, pasta. A ladle of summer in winter.
steps: Dice vegetables.
Soften onion, carrot.
Add tomato, beans, stock, simmer 15 min.
Add pasta, cook 8 min.
Top with parmesan.

title: Chicken Noodle Soup
description: Broth for the soul. Sick day cure.
steps: Poach chicken in stock with ginger, 20 min.
Shred.
Cook noodles in broth.
Return chicken, add carrot and spring onion.
Season well.

title: Pork Larb
description: Thai mince salad. Herby, punchy, easy.
steps: Brown mince in dry pan till crisp.
Off heat, toss with fish sauce, lime, herbs, chilli.
Spoon into lettuce cups.

title: Eggplant Parma
description: The vego pub hero. Crumbed, tomato, bubbly cheese.
steps: Slice zucchini lengthways.
Flour, egg, crumb, fry golden.
Layer in dish with tomato and mozzarella.
Bake 25 min at 200°C.
Basil to finish.

title: Breakfast Burrito
description: Eggs, beans, cheese, all rolled up.
steps: Scramble eggs.
Warm beans, mash lightly.
Pile onto warm tortillas with cheese, avo.
Roll tight, sear seam-side down.

title: Stir-Fry Beef
description: Fridge-emptying weeknight. Hot wok, fast hands.
steps: Slice beef thin, marinate in soy and ginger.
Blast in hot wok, 1 min, remove.
Stir-fry veg, add garlic.
Return beef, splash in oyster sauce.
Over rice.

title: Greek Lamb Souva
description: Skewers, tzatziki, warm bread. Backyard Friday.
steps: Cube lamb, skewer, marinate in oil and lemon.
Grate cucumber into yoghurt with garlic and mint.
Grill skewers 8 min.
Serve in warm flatbread with tzatziki.

title: Fried Egg Sandwich
description: Yolk, butter, sauce of your choosing.
steps: Butter bread, scrape one side with vegemite.
Fry eggs to your liking.
Sandwich. Mess is expected.

title: Mac & Cheese
description: Béchamel, cheddar, pasta, bubbly top. Comfort.
steps: Cook pasta.
Make béchamel: melt butter, whisk in flour, milk.
Off heat, melt in cheese.
Fold in pasta.
Top with crumbs, bake 15 min at 200°C.

title: Lentil Bolognese
description: All the depth of a slow ragù. Zero meat.
steps: Soften diced carrot, onion, garlic.
Add lentils, stock, tomatoes.
Simmer 35 min till thick.
Toss with cooked spaghetti.

title: Roast Veg Couscous
description: Meal-prep friendly, pretty, bright.
steps: Chop and roast veg 30 min, 200°C.
Make couscous per packet.
Toss veg through couscous with lemon.
Crumble feta on top.

title: Chicken Parma
description: Schnitty, napoli, ham, cheese. The classic.
steps: Crumb and shallow-fry schnitties.
Reduce tomato with garlic, salt.
Top each schnitty with napoli, ham, mozzarella.
Grill till melted.

title: Overnight Oats
description: Tomorrow-you will thank today-you.
steps: Mix oats, milk, yoghurt, honey in a jar.
Top with berries.
Lid on, fridge overnight.

title: Pancakes
description: Stack, butter, syrup. Weekend mandate.
steps: Whisk dry, then wet ingredients.
Rest 10 min.
Cook 2 min a side in buttered pan.
Stack unreasonably high.

title: Fish & Chips
description: Beer batter, crispy chips, fresh lemon.
steps: Cut chips, twice-fry or oven-bake.
Make batter with flour, beer, salt.
Dip fish, fry 4 min till crisp.
Serve with lemon.

title: Thai Beef Salad
description: Rare beef, herbs, chilli, lime. Summer dinner.
steps: Sear steak rare, rest, slice.
Toss veg and herbs with fish sauce, lime, chilli.
Fan beef over the top.

title: Butter Chicken
description: Melting tandoori-spiced chicken in a silky butter-tomato sauce.
steps: Marinate chicken in yoghurt, turmeric, curry powder, 30 min.
Sear chicken in butter, set aside.
Soften onion, garlic, ginger.
Blend tomato smooth, add with cream, simmer 10 min.
Return chicken, simmer 10 min.
Serve over basmati with coriander.

title: Lamb Kofta with Tzatziki
description: Spiced lamb skewers, cool yoghurt, warm flatbread. Friday night on the grill.
steps: Grate onion, squeeze dry.
Mix lamb, onion, garlic, spices, half the mint.
Shape onto skewers, chill 10 min.
Grate cucumber into yoghurt with remaining mint and garlic for tzatziki.
Grill skewers 4 min a side.
Wrap with tzatziki and lemon.

title: Pork Banh Mi
description: Crackly roll, spicy pork, pickled veg, coriander. Vietnamese sandwich royalty.
steps: Slice pork thin, marinate in soy, sriracha, lime.
Pickle julienned carrot and cucumber in vinegar and sugar, 15 min.
Sear pork in hot pan till caramelised.
Split baguettes, spread mayo, stack pork, pickles, coriander, chilli.

title: Rainbow Quinoa Salad
description: Fluffy quinoa, roast pumpkin, beetroot, feta, seeds. Meal-prep gold.
steps: Roast diced pumpkin and beetroot 30 min at 200°C.
Rinse and cook quinoa in 3 cups water, 15 min.
Whisk lemon juice with olive oil for dressing.
Toss quinoa, roast veg, rocket, mint with dressing.
Crumble feta, scatter almonds.

title: Sticky Date Pudding
description: The pub classic. Dark, toffee-soaked sponge. Serve with cream, obviously.
steps: Soak dates in 1 cup boiling water, 10 min.
Cream butter and sugar, beat in eggs.
Fold in flour, baking powder, date mix, vanilla.
Bake 30 min at 180°C.
Simmer brown sugar, butter, cream for sauce.
Pour over warm pudding, serve with thickened cream.

title: Pumpkin & Sage Risotto
description: Sweet roast pumpkin folded through creamy rice, crispy sage on top.
steps: Roast pumpkin 25 min at 200°C.
Fry sage in butter till crisp, remove.
Soften onion and garlic.
Toast rice, deglaze with wine.
Ladle in stock gradually, stirring, 20 min.
Fold through roast pumpkin and parmesan.
Top with crispy sage.

title: Thai Basil Chicken (Pad Kra Pao)
description: Fiery minced chicken with holy basil, over rice, crowned with a crispy egg.
steps: Mince garlic and chilli together.
Chop chicken roughly.
Fry garlic-chilli, add chicken, cook till browned.
Add sauces and sugar, toss in basil at the last second.
Fry an egg till edges crisp.
Serve over rice, egg on top.

title: Fudgy Chocolate Brownies
description: Crinkle top, molten middle. The kind you eat straight from the tin.
steps: Melt chocolate and butter gently.
Whisk in sugar, then eggs and vanilla.
Fold in flour, cocoa, chopped walnuts.
Pour into lined tin.
Bake 22 min at 180°C — middle should still wobble.
Cool in tin completely before slicing.

title: Sticky Pork Ribs
description: Low-and-slow ribs with a glossy glaze. Summer backyard mandatory.
steps: Rub ribs with paprika, sugar, salt.
Wrap in foil, bake 2 hr at 150°C.
Mix honey, soy, garlic, balsamic, sriracha for glaze.
Brush ribs with glaze, grill 10 min till sticky.
Rest 5 min, slice between bones.

title: Beetroot, Goat Cheese & Walnut Salad
description: Earthy roast beetroot, tangy ricotta, toasty walnuts. Entree energy.
steps: Roast whole beetroot in foil 40 min at 200°C.
Peel and wedge when cool enough to handle.
Toast walnuts dry 3 min.
Whisk oil, honey, balsamic, orange zest for dressing.
Toss rocket, beetroot, walnuts, dot with ricotta.

title: One-Pan Chorizo Pasta
description: Smoky chorizo, tomato, a hit of chilli. One pan, twelve minutes.
steps: Slice chorizo, render in oil till orange oil runs.
Add garlic and chilli.
Tip in tomatoes, simmer 3 min.
Add pasta and 400 ml water, cover, cook 10 min.
Uncover, toss till glossy.
Parsley and parmesan to finish.

title: Creamy Fish Pie
description: Flaked fish, peas, mash-topped. Nan's Sunday dinner distilled.
steps: Boil and mash potatoes with butter and splash of milk.
Poach fish in milk 4 min, lift out.
Make roux with flour and butter, whisk in poaching milk.
Fold fish, peas, parsley into sauce.
Pile in dish, top with mash, scatter cheddar.
Bake 20 min at 200°C till golden.

title: Eggs Benedict
description: The brunch order that announces you're serious. Poached eggs, ham, hollandaise, muffin.
steps: Separate 2 eggs; whisk yolks with lemon and dijon.
Stream in melted butter, whisking, for hollandaise.
Toast split muffins, warm ham briefly.
Poach remaining eggs in simmering vinegar water, 3 min.
Stack muffin, ham, egg, spoon hollandaise.
Scatter parsley.

title: Pumpkin Soup with Crispy Sage
description: Silky and warming. The unimpeachable winter entrance dish.
steps: Soften onion and garlic in butter.
Add cubed pumpkin, stock, simmer 25 min.
Fry sage leaves till crisp.
Blitz soup with cream till silky.
Season well, top with sage, bread on the side.

title: Ginger Beef Stir-Fry
description: Tender beef, snappy veg, the wok hissing. Dinner in ten.
steps: Slice beef thin, toss with 1 tbsp soy.
Blanch noodles.
Blast beef in hot wok 90 sec, remove.
Stir-fry garlic, ginger, broccoli, snow peas, bok choy.
Return beef with remaining soy and sesame oil.
Toss through noodles.

title: Fluffy Buttermilk Pancakes
description: Tall, cloud-soft pancakes. Weekend ritual with maple and butter.
steps: Whisk flour, baking powder, sugar.
Mix eggs, milk, melted butter, vanilla.
Combine gently — lumps are fine.
Rest 5 min.
Cook 2 min a side in buttered pan.
Stack with blueberries and maple.

title: Eggplant & Chickpea Curry
description: Silky eggplant, warming spices, creamy coconut. A vego crowd-pleaser.
steps: Dice eggplant, salt 10 min, pat dry.
Fry eggplant in oil till golden, set aside.
Soften onion, garlic, ginger; add spices.
Add tomato and coconut milk, simmer 10 min.
Return eggplant with chickpeas, simmer 10 min.
Stir in spinach; serve over basmati.

title: Seared Scallops with Pea Purée
description: Restaurant entrée at home. Caramel-crusted scallops on a vivid green purée.
steps: Blanch peas 2 min, plunge in iced water.
Blitz peas with mint, garlic, lemon, olive oil.
Pat scallops dry, season well.
Sear 90 sec a side in hot butter.
Spoon purée on plate, scallops on top, lemon wedge.

title: Zucchini Walnut Loaf
description: A sneaky-healthy cake pretending to be bread. Perfect with coffee.
steps: Grate zucchini, squeeze dry.
Whisk eggs, oil, sugar, vanilla.
Fold in flour, cinnamon, baking powder.
Stir through zucchini and chopped walnuts.
Bake 55 min at 170°C in lined loaf tin.
Cool 20 min before slicing.

title: Duck Noodle Soup
description: Rich broth, crispy-skinned duck, rice noodles. Weeknight indulgence.
steps: Score duck skin, render in cold pan till crisp, 8 min.
Flip, cook 3 min, rest.
Simmer stock with ginger and garlic, 10 min.
Cook noodles in broth, add bok choy last minute.
Season with soy.
Slice duck, fan over bowls, top with spring onion and chilli.

title: Classic Beef Burger
description: Juicy pattie, melty cheddar, lettuce, tomato, soft roll. Friday night staple.
steps: Shape mince into 4 fat patties, season.
Sear 3 min a side in hot pan.
Melt a slice of cheddar on each.
Toast rolls, spread with mayo and dijon.
Stack roll, lettuce, tomato, onion, pattie.

title: Classic Lasagna
description: Sheets of pasta, rich ragù, béchamel, a pile of parmesan. A weekend project.
steps: Sweat diced carrot, celery, onion, garlic.
Brown mince, add tomatoes, simmer 30 min.
Melt butter, whisk in flour and milk for béchamel.
Layer pasta, ragù, béchamel, cheese in a dish.
Repeat until everything is used, finishing with cheese.
Bake 45 min at 180°C, rest 15 min before cutting.

title: Provençal Ratatouille
description: Ribbons of summer vegetables baked in tomato. Looks like a painting, eats like heaven.
steps: Slice all veg into 5mm rounds.
Soften onion and garlic in olive oil, stir through tomato to make sauce.
Spread sauce in a round dish.
Fan veg slices alternating colours, in a spiral.
Cover with baking paper, bake 45 min at 190°C.
Basil and a drizzle of oil to serve.

title: Gnocchi al Pomodoro
description: Pillowy potato dumplings in the simplest tomato sauce. Twenty minutes.
steps: Warm oil with smashed garlic cloves, 2 min.
Add tomatoes, simmer 10 min.
Cook gnocchi — they float when done, 2 min.
Toss through sauce with butter.
Basil and parmesan to finish.

title: Bibimbap
description: Seoul in a bowl. Vegetables, beef, rice, a runny yolk, stir it all together.
steps: Cook rice, keep warm.
Stir-fry beef with soy and sesame oil.
Sauté julienned carrot, wilt spinach, pan-fry mushrooms separately.
Fry eggs sunny-side up.
Arrange rice in bowls, pile veg zones around, beef, kimchi, egg on top.
Gochujang on the side, stir before eating.

title: Beef Pho
description: Clear aromatic broth, thin rice noodles, pink beef cooked by the hot broth itself.
steps: Char halved onion and ginger directly on the gas, 5 min.
Simmer stock with onion, ginger, cinnamon, fish sauce, 25 min.
Strain broth, keep piping hot.
Cook noodles, divide between bowls.
Slice beef paper-thin, lay over noodles.
Pour boiling broth over; beef cooks in seconds.
Top with herbs, chilli, lime wedge.

title: Miso Ramen
description: Funky, savoury broth; springy noodles; a soft egg. Umami bomb in a bowl.
steps: Soft-boil eggs 6 min, plunge in iced water.
Sear pork belly till crisp, slice.
Simmer stock with garlic and ginger, 10 min.
Whisk miso into broth, don't boil.
Cook noodles separately, divide between bowls.
Ladle broth over noodles.
Top with pork, halved egg, wilted bok choy, nori, spring onion.

title: Chicken Katsu Curry
description: Crisp panko chicken over rice, silky curry sauce. Japanese comfort food.
steps: Flatten chicken, flour-egg-crumb.
Soften onion and carrot, add curry powder.
Stir in stock, soy, honey, simmer 10 min till thick.
Shallow-fry chicken 4 min a side till deep gold.
Slice, serve over rice, pour curry sauce over.

title: Pan-Fried Gyoza
description: Crispy bottoms, juicy pork, tangy dipping sauce. Fold a dozen, friends arrive.
steps: Salt shredded cabbage, 10 min, squeeze dry.
Mix with pork, grated ginger, garlic, soy, sesame oil, spring onion.
Place spoonful on wrapper, pleat and seal.
Fry flat-side down in oil till bottoms are gold, 2 min.
Add 1/4 cup water, cover, steam 4 min.
Uncover, crisp bases again, 2 min.
Serve with soy and vinegar.

title: Chicken Fajitas
description: Sizzling peppers and chicken, warm tortillas, let everyone build their own.
steps: Slice chicken and veg into fajita strips.
Toss chicken with spices, lime juice.
Blast in very hot pan 5 min, remove.
Char peppers and onion 4 min.
Return chicken, toss.
Serve with tortillas, sour cream, avocado, coriander.

title: Cheesy Quesadillas
description: Molten cheese, charred tortilla, lazy-dinner glory. Fifteen minutes top to bottom.
steps: Finely slice spring onion and capsicum.
Scatter cheese + veg over half a tortilla, fold.
Cook in a dry pan till gold and melted, flip, 2 min a side.
Slice into wedges, top with coriander.
Sour cream for dipping.

title: Palak Paneer
description: Vivid spinach sauce, golden cubes of paneer, warm naan. Indian date-night hero.
steps: Blanch spinach 1 min, blitz to a paste.
Cube and pan-fry paneer till gold, set aside.
Soften onion, garlic, ginger with spices.
Add tomato, simmer 10 min, then stir in spinach.
Fold in cream and paneer, warm through.
Serve over basmati.

title: Chana Masala
description: Spiced chickpeas that get better on day two. Pantry staple hero.
steps: Blitz onion, garlic, ginger to paste.
Fry paste with spices till fragrant.
Add tomato, simmer 10 min.
Tip in chickpeas + liquid, simmer 15 min.
Mash a few chickpeas to thicken.
Serve over rice with coriander.

title: Quick Chicken Biryani
description: Saffron-stained rice, marinated chicken, caramelised onion. A celebration in a pot.
steps: Marinate chicken in yoghurt + spices, 15 min.
Fry sliced onions till deep brown, set aside.
Brown chicken in the same pot.
Rinse rice, layer on top of chicken.
Pour 3 cups water over, season.
Cover tight, cook 18 min on low, rest 10.
Fluff, top with fried onion, herbs.

title: Falafel Bowl with Tahini
description: Crunchy chickpea patties, grains, pickled veg, creamy sauce. Meal-prep friendly.
steps: Blitz drained chickpeas with garlic, onion, herbs, cumin, flour.
Shape into small patties.
Pan-fry in oil till gold, 3 min a side.
Cook quinoa.
Whisk yoghurt with lemon, garlic for sauce.
Build bowls: quinoa, rocket, cucumber, falafel, sauce.

title: Chicken Shawarma Wraps
description: Spice-rubbed chicken, garlic sauce, pickled veg, all rolled tight.
steps: Mix half yoghurt with spices, lemon, garlic.
Marinate chicken 30 min or overnight.
Grill or pan-fry till charred, 4 min a side.
Slice thin.
Stir remaining yoghurt with garlic, lemon.
Warm wraps, fill with chicken, salad, sauce.

title: Classic Meat Pie
description: Puff lid, rich mince filling. A servo staple made properly.
steps: Brown mince, add onion and garlic.
Stir in flour, then stock, tomato, Worcestershire.
Simmer 20 min till thick, cool.
Line pie tin with pastry, fill with mince, top with another pastry sheet.
Egg wash lid, cut a vent.
Bake 25 min at 200°C till deep gold.

title: Beef Stroganoff
description: Tender beef, mushrooms, silky sour cream sauce, over noodles. Nan food.
steps: Slice beef thin, toss with salt and pepper.
Sear in very hot pan 90 sec, remove.
Sauté mushrooms, onion, garlic in butter.
Deglaze with stock, stir in dijon and sour cream.
Return beef, warm through.
Serve over buttered noodles with parsley.

title: Cottage Pie
description: Savoury mince under a golden mash lid. A hug in a dish.
steps: Sweat diced carrot, celery, onion, garlic.
Brown mince, add stock and Worcestershire, simmer 15 min.
Stir in peas.
Boil potatoes, mash with butter and milk.
Tip mince into dish, pile mash on top, rough with a fork.
Bake 30 min at 200°C till golden.

title: Caprese Salad
description: Mozzarella, tomato, basil, olive oil. Summer on a plate — buy the best of everything.
steps: Slice tomato and mozzarella.
Alternate on a platter with basil leaves.
Dress with oil, a few drops of balsamic, sea salt.
Eat immediately.

title: Tomato Bruschetta
description: Charred bread, sun-ripe tomato, basil. A backdrop to wine.
steps: Dice tomatoes, salt lightly, drain.
Toss with torn basil, oil, balsamic.
Grill bread both sides.
Rub hot bread with garlic clove.
Pile tomato on top.

title: Parsley Tabouleh
description: A salad that's actually herbs. Bright, green, and unreasonably good.
steps: Cover couscous in hot water, rest 10 min, fluff.
Very finely chop parsley, mint, spring onion.
Dice tomato small.
Combine everything with lemon and oil.
Season, rest 10 min before serving.

title: Cinnamon French Toast
description: Custard-soaked bread, a golden crust, maple dripping off the edges.
steps: Whisk eggs, milk, cinnamon, vanilla.
Soak bread 30 sec a side.
Fry in butter 2 min a side till gold.
Stack, dust with cinnamon, drown in syrup.
Strawberries on top.

title: Yoghurt & Granola Bowl
description: Toasted oats, honey-crunchy, cold yoghurt, bright fruit. Breakfast or honest dessert.
steps: Mix oats, chopped nuts, cinnamon.
Warm honey, oil, vanilla; toss through oats.
Spread on a tray, bake 25 min at 160°C, stirring twice.
Cool (it crisps as it cools).
Layer yoghurt, granola, blueberries in a bowl.

title: Passionfruit Pavlova
description: Crisp shell, marshmallow heart, cream, tropical fruit. The argument we'll never settle with NZ.
steps: Whip whites till soft peaks.
Add sugar a spoon at a time till glossy and thick.
Fold in vanilla.
Pile on baking paper into a round, shape edges high.
Bake 90 min at 120°C, cool in oven with door ajar.
Whip cream, pile on top.
Crown with passionfruit pulp, sliced fruit.

title: Apple & Oat Crumble
description: Soft cinnamon apples, buttery oat lid. Winter antidote.
steps: Peel and chunk apples, toss with sugar, cinnamon, lemon.
Pile in a baking dish.
Rub butter into flour, stir in oats, chopped walnuts, more sugar.
Scatter over apples.
Bake 40 min at 180°C till gold.
Cream or ice cream.

title: Tiramisu
description: Coffee-soaked sponge, mascarpone clouds, a cocoa dust. Sunday-lunch encore.
steps: Separate eggs.
Beat yolks with sugar till pale; fold in mascarpone and vanilla.
Whip whites to soft peaks, fold in.
Whip cream, fold through.
Dip biscuits in coffee, lay in dish.
Spread half the cream, repeat layers.
Chill 6 hr, dust with cocoa before serving.

title: Lemon Tart
description: Sharp, silky curd in a buttery crust. Afternoon-tea royalty.
steps: Rub cold butter into flour with 1/4 cup sugar, add yolk.
Press into tart tin, chill 30 min.
Blind-bake 15 min at 180°C.
Whisk eggs, remaining sugar, lemon juice and zest, cream.
Pour into shell.
Bake 25 min at 160°C till just set.
Chill 3 hr, slice.

title: Anzac Biscuits
description: Oat, coconut, golden syrup. Crisp-edged, chewy-hearted.
steps: Mix oats, flour, sugar in a bowl.
Melt butter with golden syrup.
Dissolve bicarb in 2 tbsp hot water, stir into butter.
Tip into dry mix, combine.
Roll spoonfuls onto trays, flatten.
Bake 15 min at 160°C till deep gold. Cool on tray.

title: Campfire Damper
description: A quick scone-loaf. Butter and honey while it's still warm.
steps: Rub butter into flour and salt.
Mix in milk till just combined.
Shape into a round on a tray, slash a cross on top.
Dust with flour.
Bake 25 min at 200°C till hollow when tapped.
Hot, with butter and honey.

title: Lamingtons
description: Sponge, chocolate icing, coconut. The most Australian afternoon tea.
steps: Cream butter and sugar, beat in eggs and vanilla.
Alternate flour and milk into batter.
Bake in a lined tray 25 min at 180°C.
Cool, cut into squares.
Whisk cocoa with 2 cups icing sugar and a splash of boiling water for glaze.
Dunk each square, then roll in coconut.
Rest on a rack till set.

title: Crispy Tofu Stir-Fry
description: Golden tofu cubes, sticky sauce, crunch. Twenty minutes, no meat missed.
steps: Press tofu 10 min, cube.
Toss in cornflour, pan-fry till crisp all over.
Stir-fry veg with garlic and ginger, 3 min.
Splash in soy, honey, sesame oil.
Fold tofu back through.
Over jasmine rice.

title: Loaded Beef Nachos
description: Melty cheese, spiced mince, sour cream, corn chips. A couch night.
steps: Brown mince with spices, add beans and tomato, simmer 10 min.
Spread chips in a baking dish.
Pile mince on top, blanket with cheese.
Bake 8 min at 200°C till bubbling.
Top with avo, sour cream, coriander, chilli, lime.

title: Buffalo Chicken Wings
description: Sticky, spicy, blue-cheese cool-down. Napkin food.
steps: Toss wings with flour, paprika, salt.
Bake on a rack 40 min at 220°C, flipping once.
Melt butter with sriracha, honey, vinegar.
Toss hot wings in sauce.
Serve with celery sticks and crumbled blue cheese in yoghurt.

title: Chicken Satay Skewers
description: Grilled chook, peanut-coconut sauce, steamed rice. Backyard favourite.
steps: Cube chicken, thread onto skewers.
Whisk peanut butter, coconut milk, soy, garlic, ginger, honey.
Brush half over skewers, marinate 10 min.
Grill 5 min a side.
Warm remaining sauce, thin with lime juice.
Serve over rice with coriander and chilli.

title: San Choy Bow
description: Pork mince in crunchy lettuce cups. A taco from the east.
steps: Finely dice mushroom and carrot.
Fry pork till browned and crisp edges.
Add garlic, ginger, veg, stir-fry 3 min.
Splash in sauces and sesame oil.
Peel lettuce cups, spoon in pork, top with spring onion.

title: Pad See Ew
description: Charred rice noodles, sweet dark soy, gai lan, beef. The wok smell of Bangkok.
steps: Soak noodles per packet.
Slice beef thin, sear hot wok 60 sec, remove.
Fry garlic, crack in eggs and scramble.
Add noodles with sauces and sugar, char 2 min.
Toss in greens and beef.
Serve with chilli vinegar.

title: Korean Beef Bowl
description: Sweet-salty bulgogi over rice, crunchy veg, a sesame finish.
steps: Whisk soy, honey, sesame oil, gochujang, garlic, ginger.
Brown beef in hot pan, pour in sauce, reduce 2 min.
Julienne carrot.
Fry eggs sunny-side up.
Bowls: rice, beef, carrot, kimchi, egg, spring onion.

title: Moroccan Chicken Tagine
description: Saffron-scented chicken, lemon, olives, apricots. Slow-cooker Sunday.
steps: Brown chicken in oil, set aside.
Soften onions with spices, 5 min.
Add garlic, ginger, stock; return chicken.
Preserved-lemon-style: lemon quarters and olives on top.
Cover, simmer 75 min low and slow.
Fluff couscous, pile in bowls with tagine and coriander.

title: Chicken & Chorizo Paella
description: Saffron rice, crusty socarrat bottom, seafood optional but encouraged.
steps: Brown chicken and chorizo in a wide pan.
Soften onion, garlic, capsicum.
Stir in tomato paste, paprika, turmeric.
Add rice and stock, simmer 15 min without stirring.
Nestle prawns and peas on top, cover 5 min.
Crisp the bottom 2 min on high.
Rest, scatter lemon.

title: Tom Yum Goong
description: Hot-and-sour prawn soup. Lemongrass, lime, chilli — turns a head-cold around.
steps: Simmer stock with ginger, chillies, tomato quarters, 10 min.
Season with fish sauce.
Add mushrooms, simmer 2 min.
Add prawns, cook till pink, 2 min.
Off heat, pour in lime juice.
Finish with coriander and spring onion.

title: French Onion Soup
description: Caramelised onions, broth that tastes of time, a raft of molten gruyère toast.
steps: Thinly slice onions.
Cook in butter, low and slow, 45 min — stir often — till deeply brown.
Stir in flour, then wine; reduce.
Pour in stock and thyme, simmer 15 min.
Toast bread, pile cheese.
Ladle soup into oven-proof bowls, float toast, grill till bubbling.

title: Cream of Mushroom
description: Silky, earthy, deeply comforting. Crack black pepper liberally.
steps: Brown mushrooms hard in butter — don't crowd the pan.
Set half aside, soften onion and garlic with thyme.
Stir in flour; whisk in stock.
Return mushrooms, simmer 10 min; blitz half.
Fold in cream, reheat gently.
Top with reserved mushrooms and bread.

title: Choc Chip Cookies
description: Crisp edges, chewy centres, puddles of dark chocolate. Straight from the oven.
steps: Cream butter and sugars till pale.
Beat in eggs and vanilla.
Fold in flour, bicarb, pinch of salt.
Stir through chocolate chips.
Roll into balls on lined trays, leave space.
Bake 12 min at 180°C till edges set; cool on tray.

title: New York Cheesecake
description: Dense, tangy, 1980s-sitcom perfect. Overnight patience required.
steps: Melt butter, stir into crumbs, press into springform base.
Beat cream cheese and sugar till smooth.
Add eggs one at a time, cream, vanilla, lemon, flour.
Pour over base.
Bake 70 min at 160°C in a water bath; oven off, door ajar 30 min.
Chill overnight. Top with berries.

title: Lemon Delicious Pudding
description: Self-saucing magic: fluffy sponge above, tangy curd beneath.
steps: Cream butter, sugar, lemon zest.
Beat in yolks and flour alternately with milk.
Stir in lemon juice.
Whisk whites to soft peaks, fold in.
Pour into buttered dish, sit in water bath.
Bake 45 min at 170°C till golden and wobbly.

title: Rocky Road
description: Marshmallows, nuts, glacé cherries, a chocolate mortar. School-fête classic.
steps: Melt chocolate with butter, stir smooth.
Chop nuts, quarter any large fruit.
Stir everything through chocolate.
Tip into lined tin, press flat.
Chill 2 hr till firm.
Cut into slabs.

title: Apple Pie
description: A lattice top, cinnamon apples, cream or custard. Anyone who says otherwise is wrong.
steps: Slice apples, toss with sugar, cinnamon, flour, lemon.
Line tin with pastry, fill.
Dot with butter, lattice second pastry over top.
Egg wash, sprinkle sugar.
Bake 55 min at 190°C till deep gold and bubbling.
Rest 30 min before cutting — juices need to set.

title: Berry Smoothie Bowl
description: Cold, pink, crunchy on top. Breakfast that looks like a postcard.
steps: Blitz frozen banana, berries, yoghurt, milk, honey to thick cream.
Spoon into bowls.
Top with oats, chopped almond, fresh berries.

title: Crispy Hash Browns
description: Lacy-edge golden patties. Ideal diner breakfast, elite weekend energy.
steps: Grate potato and onion, squeeze very dry.
Season well.
Shape into patties, press flat.
Fry in hot butter and oil 4 min a side till lace-crisp.
Drain on paper, hit with sea salt.

title: The Ultimate Cheese Toastie
description: Butter-soaked sourdough, a river of cheddar, a crack of pepper.
steps: Butter outsides of bread heavily.
Spread inside with dijon.
Pile cheese between, close.
Fry over medium till deep gold, 3 min a side, pressing.
Rest 1 min, slice on the bias.

title: French Omelette
description: Pale yellow, soft folded curds, a chive whisper. Julia-approved.
steps: Beat eggs with salt and pepper.
Melt butter in a 20cm pan till foam subsides.
Pour in eggs, swirl and stir with fork, 30 sec.
When set but glossy, tilt pan, fold into a cigar shape.
Tip onto plate, scatter chives.

title: Overnight Bircher Muesli
description: Grated apple, soaked oats, yoghurt, honey. Breakfast that makes itself.
steps: Stir oats, milk, half the honey, cinnamon.
Grate in apple, add raisins, cover.
Chill overnight.
Stir through yoghurt in the morning.
Top with remaining honey and almonds.

title: Pull-Apart Garlic Bread
description: Buttery, herby, the loaf that vanishes first. Every-night energy.
steps: Slice loaf at 2cm intervals, almost all the way through.
Cream butter with crushed garlic, chopped parsley, parmesan.
Slather between every slice.
Wrap in foil, bake 12 min at 200°C.
Open foil, grill 3 min till crispy tops.

title: Yorkshire Puddings
description: Sky-high, golden, essential alongside a roast. Rest the batter.
steps: Whisk eggs, milk, flour, salt smooth. Rest 30 min.
Pour 1 tsp oil into each muffin hole.
Heat tin 10 min at 230°C till smoking.
Fill each hole 3/4 with batter.
Do not open oven. Bake 20 min.
They're done when tall and deep gold.

title: Chimichurri Steak
description: Char-kissed steak, vivid green herb sauce. South American Friday.
steps: Bring steak to room temp, season well.
Blitz parsley, oregano, garlic, chilli, vinegar, oil to a chunky sauce.
Sear steak 3 min a side in a very hot pan.
Rest 5 min, slice against the grain.
Spoon chimichurri generously.

title: BBQ Pulled Pork
description: Low-and-slow shoulder that falls into soft strands. Serve on rolls, slaw on top.
steps: Rub pork with paprika, sugar, cumin, salt.
Sear on all sides.
Whisk tomato paste, vinegar, Worcestershire, honey, stock.
Pour into pot, cover tight, bake 4 hr at 150°C.
Shred with forks, toss in pan juices.
Shred cabbage and carrot, dress with mayo and vinegar for slaw.
Stack pork in rolls, pile slaw on top.

title: Rosemary Focaccia
description: Dimpled, salty, olive-oil-drenched. The easy yeast bread.
steps: Bloom yeast in 400 ml warm water with sugar, 10 min.
Mix with flour, 1/3 cup oil, salt, no knead.
Cover, rise 2 hr.
Spread in oiled tray, dimple with fingers.
Top with oil, rosemary, sliced garlic, salt.
Rise 30 min, bake 22 min at 220°C.

title: Ham & Cheese Jaffle
description: The sealed-edge, molten-middle sandwich press legend.
steps: Butter bread outsides.
Layer ham, cheese, tomato between.
Press in a jaffle iron 5 min till outside crisp and corners sealed.
Rest a minute before biting — lava cheese incident otherwise.

title: Buttermilk Coleslaw
description: Crunchy, creamy, tangy. BBQ essential, pulled-pork friend.
steps: Shred cabbage, grate carrot, thin-slice onion.
Whisk mayo, yoghurt, vinegar, dijon, sugar.
Toss through veg, rest 15 min.
Finish with parsley and a crack of pepper.

title: Silky Mashed Potato
description: Buttery, smooth, the platform every stew deserves.
steps: Peel and chunk potatoes, cover in cold salted water.
Bring to boil, simmer 18 min till fork-tender.
Drain, dry in the pot 2 min.
Mash with warm butter and milk.
Season well, beat to silky.
